resources.string: Scan your device’s QR code to connect.
Select Zodl app and scan QR code
Connecting to a hardware wallet that was previously connected to Zodl will require synchronization to discover your transaction history. We\'ll guide you through it.
Your Keystone Hardware Wallet has been successfully connected.
Entering the block height at which your wallet was created ensures that correct number of blocks will be scanned. If you\’re not sure, choose an earlier date.
If you\’re not sure, choose an earlier date.
A hardware wallet (HW wallet) is a physical device that stores your cryptocurrency private keys offline, keeping them safe from online hackers and malware.
Your keys never leave the device, even when signing transactions
Immune to computer viruses and phishing attacks
You own your keys, you own your crypto
Keystone is a popular hardware wallet brand that offers air-gapped security with QR code signing. It\'s one of many trusted hardware wallet options, alongside Ledger and others.

is the block height (block # in the blockchain) at which your wallet was created. It is important to provide the correct height because that determines the range of blocks we will scan to display your transaction history and wallet balance. If you have recovered a seed from a different hardware device, make sure to enter the block height of your original hardware device.
